faqs.question: What business processes can AI automate?
faqs.answer: AI can automate virtually any repetitive, rules-based process: lead qualification and scoring, customer support responses, data entry and CRM enrichment, document processing and extraction, email sequences and follow-ups, reporting and analytics, content generation, and scheduling. If a task follows patterns and rules, AI can likely handle it.

faqs.question: Is my business data safe with AI automation?
faqs.answer: Yes. I prioritize data security in every implementation. Options include on-premise deployment, private cloud hosting, encrypted data handling, and API configurations that prevent your data from being used for model training. Your sensitive information stays within your control.

faqs.question: How long does it take to implement AI automation?
faqs.answer: Simple automations can go live in 1-2 weeks. Complex systems with multiple integrations typically take 4-8 weeks. I always start with a pilot project to prove ROI before scaling to larger implementations.

faqs.question: What's the typical ROI of AI automation?
faqs.answer: Most businesses see 3-10x ROI within the first year. Common results include 60-80% reduction in manual task time, 90%+ accuracy improvements, 24/7 availability, and the ability to scale operations without proportional headcount increases.
